name: CodeViz - Educational C Programming Compiler
description: CodeViz – An offline, interactive C programming learning and compiler app with themes, tooltips, and personalized user experience.
problem: Students struggle to learn C programming without real-time feedback and visualization. Traditional IDEs lack educational features and require constant internet connectivity.
solution: Build an offline, interactive C compiler with educational features, theme customization, and personalized user experience for enhanced learning.
features: Interactive code execution with real-time feedback
Multiple theme support for personalized experience
Context-aware tooltips for C programming concepts
challenges: Placeholder: Add technical challenges faced during development
